headline: Devon Announces Results of Early Participation in Private Exchange Offers and Consent Solicitations and Extension of Deadline to Receive Total Exchange Consideration

headline: Devon Energy Reshapes Portfolio And Capital Returns After Coterra Merger
summary: Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN) plans to divest its Marcellus asset, which is reportedly valued at about $8b. The move follows shareholder approval of Devon Energy's merger with Coterra Energy. Management has outlined a new $5b share repurchase program and an increase to the quarterly dividend. Devon Energy enters this phase of corporate change with its stock at $44.28 and a 39.1% gain over the past year, while the 3 year return is roughly flat. The share price is up 94.3% over the past 5 years,...
